parity.notes: Counted on the reference solutions (both arms structurally parallel): 1 static class/module + NeedsQuoting (1) + EscapeField (branch, 2) + JoinRow (loop + separator branch, 3) + SplitRow (loop + in-quotes branch + quote branch + lookahead branch + comma branch + quote-start branch, 7). Complexity = 1 per function + 1 per branch/loop. Calor iterates characters via one-char substrings where C# indexes chars (char literals emit as strings in Calor) — same branch structure. Second-wave hardness pair (doubled-quote unescaping, quoted separators, empty/trailing fields, round-trip property); NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).

wedgeWhitelistCheck: n/a (neutral category). No contracts anywhere in the fixtures or references; SplitRow declares the enforced 'mut' effect for list building in the Calor arm.
